top.name: Assembly Line
top.rules_text: For 3 turns: at the start of each turn deploy a free Drone (6HP 3DMG) on a random empty tile adjacent to one of your constructs.

channel.name: Assembly Line (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Deploy 2 Drones per turn instead

bottom.name: Sygaldry Masterwork
bottom.rules_text: Choose a construct. Permanently give it +3HP +2DMG +1 Range and Regen 1 (heals 2 at start of each turn). It becomes a Masterwork.

channel.name: Sygaldry Masterwork (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Also becomes immune to enemy spell effects
